Smaller catalogue concentrates the quality at the 2026 Inglis Australian Weanling Sale

Rosemont Stud has opted for stability in 2026, retaining its six-stallion roster while refining fees to reflect current conditions. General Manager, Bloodstock Ryan McEvoy outlines a balanced approach centred on value, performance, and ongoing support.

G1 Dubai World Cup hero Laurel River, a son of the Champion sire Into Mischief, will shuttle to Woodside Park Stud in Victoria this season, bringing elite global form, versatility and a highly sought-after American sireline to Australia.
Blue Gum Farm has confirmed its 2026 stallion fees, with Flying Artie to stand at $14,850 inc GST and Oxley Road at $5500 inc GST, following a season of on-track results and steady support at stud.

A wire to wire win in the G3 Queen Mother Memorial Cup for Romantic Thor has the Danny Shum trainee on track for a clash with stablemate Romantic Warrior in the G1 Champions & Chater Cup, while jockey Andrea Atzeni booted home a treble including the impressive Sky Jewellery.

At Newmarket, the Group 1 action continued on Sunday with "monstrous" True Love delivering Aidan O'Brien an eighth victory in the G1 1000 Guineas, which over in Japan, Croix Du Nord emulated his father Kitasan Black when pulling off the G1 Osaka Hai-Tenno Sho (Spring) double in a thrilling close finish.

$160,000 Clarendon Stakes winner Stormy Marco is a product of Rathmore Lodge owner Ross Hatton's emphasis on pinpointing value at the mare sales, and he hopes that his 14-strong Inglis Australian Weanling Sale draft harbours another star in 2026.

Wigmore's G1 South Australian Derby victory is the latest vindication for OTI Racing's tried and true methods of buying Kiwi gallopers. With the tried horse market becoming more competitive worldwide, the syndicator embraces being licensed in New Zealand and strengthening their relationships with the trainers they have traded with before.

Ahead of the Inglis Australian Weanling Sale, TTR talked to some of the non-stallion standing farms to get opinions about which newly-announced fees for 2026 looked like good value in the marketplace.
